description: Your high-power rocket needs to be flown on a smaller field with a strict 1,000 meter altitude waiver. Using the rocket design at ~/Documents/rockets/dual_parachute_deployment.ork, design a 29mm sub-caliber motor adapter (minimum 120mm length) supported by at least two centering rings. The original motor mount tube and centering rings must remain unmodified. Select and configure a 29mm motor that results in a stable flight with a simulated apogee between 150 meters and 1,000 meters. Save the updated design to ~/Documents/rockets/adapted_dual_deploy.ork and generate a hardware verification report at ~/Documents/exports/adapter_report.txt. The report must include the adapter inner diameter (29mm), the motor manufacturer and designation, the simulated maximum altitude, and a confirmation that the original motor mount was left intact.
